title: Prenatal Exposure to Phthalates and Anogenital Distance in Male Infants from a Low-Exposed Danish Cohort (2010-2012).
ehr_evidence: The study is a prospective cohort study (Odense Child Cohort) and does not mention using EHR data.
summary: Prospective study investigating the association between maternal urinary phthalate metabolite concentrations during pregnancy and anogenital distance (AGD) and penile width in male offspring in a Danish cohort.
population: 273 mother-son pairs in the Odense Child Cohort study, Denmark
limitations: Text is incomplete; results section is missing.
